diagrams.title: Stack Operations Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows push and pop operations on an array-based stack with visual representation of top pointer
diagrams.purpose: Understand how top pointer changes with push/pop and identify overflow/underflow conditions

diagrams.title: Linked List Stack Implementation
diagrams.description: Shows nodes connected as a stack with head as top, and push/pop at head operations
diagrams.purpose: Visualize dynamic stack implementation using linked list and understand O(1) operations at head

diagrams.title: Infix to Postfix Conversion Process
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step conversion of A*B+C-D/E with operator stack and output queue
diagrams.purpose: Understand algorithm for infix to postfix conversion and operator precedence handling

diagrams.title: Postfix Expression Evaluation
diagrams.description: Shows stack state at each step while evaluating postfix expression 6 2 + 3 *
diagrams.purpose: Learn how to evaluate postfix expressions using stack by visualizing operand and operator handling
